home.title: Learn software testing by doing it.
home.description: Study the theory, test realistic systems, submit evidence, improve with trainer feedback, and build a verified portfolio.
home.workflowTitle: A practical path to verified skill

catalog.title: Course catalog
catalog.description: Build job-relevant testing skills through guided practice and review.
catalog.courseDescription: Learn test design, defect reporting, and practical exploratory testing in realistic exercises.

auth.name: Full name
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue.
auth.invalid: Check your details and try again.

learner.taskObjective: Design tests that expose boundary, validation, and critical-flow risks.
learner.question: Ask a task question

trainer.versionConflict: This submission changed while you were reviewing it. Reload before deciding.

admin.impersonation: You are viewing DiTeLe in another role view. Your administrator rights are unchanged.

shared.title: Title
shared.readOnlyNotice: This version is published and can no longer be changed.
shared.loadError: The data could not be loaded.

dashboard.title: System overview
dashboard.subtitle: Key figures for the platform and its content.
dashboard.activityBlocked: The event log is not readable in this session.
dashboard.contentStatusEmpty: There are no content versions yet.

courses.title: Course management
courses.subtitle: All courses, their versions and publication state.
courses.emptyDescription: Create the first course to start authoring content.

courseNew.title: Create course
courseNew.subtitle: Course content is written in German. A title and short description are enough to start.
courseNew.slugHint: Generated from the title. Lower-case letters, digits and hyphens.
courseNew.optionalLocalesHint: Can be added later in the course. The German texts must be complete for approval.
courseNew.errorSlugFormat: Only lower-case letters, digits and hyphens.

course.title: Edit course
course.versionNewHint: Creates a new draft. The published version stays unchanged.
course.versionsEmptyDescription: Create a version to add stages and tasks.
course.archiveHint: An archived course disappears from the catalogue. Published versions are kept.

studio.title: Content studio
studio.stageDeleteConfirm: This stage and all of its tasks will be deleted.
studio.stagesEmptyDescription: A version needs at least one stage with at least one task.
studio.taskDeleteConfirm: This task will be deleted with all its texts, hints and answers.
studio.tasksEmpty: This stage has no task yet.
studio.taskTargetUrlHint: Practical tasks only. Embedded in the task workspace.
studio.taskHintsHint: Every hint must be provided in German.
studio.taskSkillsHint: The weights must add up to exactly 100%.
studio.readOnlyDescription: Published and archived versions are immutable. Create a new version in the course to continue working.

lifecycle.title: Publication
lifecycle.commentRequired: A comment is required for this decision.
lifecycle.approvedNotice: Approved — the version can be published.
lifecycle.approvedStale: The content has changed since approval. The version must be approved again.
lifecycle.checklistHint: Every item must be met before the version can be submitted for review.
lifecycle.checkStageTasks: Every stage has at least one task
lifecycle.checkTaskSkills: Every task has a skill mapping of exactly 100%
lifecycle.archiveImpactHint: Archiving is final. Check the impact before you continue.

taskInventory.title: Task inventory
taskInventory.subtitle: Every task across all courses and versions.
taskInventory.emptyDescription: Tasks are created in the content studio of a course version.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: The requested information is currently unavailable.
errors.forbiddenDescription: Your account is not allowed to open this resource.
errors.offlineDescription: Reconnect and retry. Your saved draft is kept locally until the server confirms it.

landing.title: You learn software testing by testing.
landing.subtitle: DiTeLe combines theory with real practice: you test running applications, write professional defect reports and get feedback from experienced trainers.
landing.valueSubtitle: Theory is everywhere. The difference is the practice behind it.
landing.value1Body: Every practical task opens a running web application right next to the brief. No screenshot, no video — you test it yourself.
landing.value2Title: Defect reports like on the job
landing.value2Body: Title, steps, expected and actual behaviour, severity: you learn the structure development teams actually read.
landing.value3Body: Every submission is reviewed and commented on. You see exactly what convinced and what is still missing.
landing.howSubtitle: Four steps that repeat for every task — until the technique sticks.
landing.step1Body: Short units of video, script and quiz cover the theory.
landing.step2Body: The practical task opens a real test environment in the browser.
landing.step3Body: You document your findings as a structured defect report.
landing.step4Body: Your trainer reviews the submission and replies.
landing.coursesSubtitle: Hands-on courses on test design, test execution and defect reporting.
landing.coursesEmptyBody: As soon as the first course is published, it will appear here.
landing.coursesErrorBody: The catalogue cannot be reached right now. Please try again later.
landing.finalBody: Create a free account, request a course and start with your first practical task.

forbidden.title: No access
forbidden.body: Your account is not allowed to open this page. If you think this is a mistake, contact your trainer or an administrator.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This address does not exist. It may have been moved, or the link is out of date.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: The page could not be loaded. Please try again.

common.saveFailed: The change could not be saved.
common.blockedTitle: This action is not possible right now

users.title: User management
users.description: Accounts, roles and access for the platform.
users.emptyDescription: Adjust the search or the role filter.

userNew.title: Create user
userNew.description: The account is created immediately and works without email confirmation.
userNew.passwordHint: At least 12 characters with upper and lower case, a digit and a special character.
userNew.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address.
userNew.passwordRequired: The password does not meet the policy.

userDetail.title: User detail
userDetail.profileReadOnly: Only the account holder can change their own profile data.
userDetail.deactivateWarning: The account will no longer be able to sign in. Learning data is kept.
userDetail.passwordSet: Password set. Please share it with the account holder securely.
userDetail.selfProtected: You cannot deactivate your own account.

applications.title: Course requests
applications.description: Approve or reject requests and assign them to a group.
applications.noCohortForCourse: There is no group for this course yet.
applications.emptyDescription: As soon as a learner requests a course, the request appears here.
applications.decidedNotice: Already decided — no further action possible.

issues.title: Issue reports
issues.description: Review reported problems and keep their status up to date.
issues.emptyDescription: There are no reported problems. Reporting is not yet enabled for learners.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Platform information and reference values. This page is intentionally read-only.
settings.rolesHint: The database knows eight roles; the interface maps them onto three.
settings.providersHint: These services are deliberately disabled on this installation.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emailHint: The email address cannot be changed here.

groupDetail.lifecycleHint: A status change is final and is recorded.
groupDetail.noTransitions: No further change is possible from this status.

groupDetail.membersReadOnly: Members are added by assigning an approved course request.
groupDetail.trainerBlocked: Trainers cannot currently be assigned to a group (I-011/I-012, database migration required).
